daily.today_energy: Your mind's running at full speed today, and honestly? That's your superpower. Channel that mental restlessness into something creative instead of spiraling. You're giving main character energy.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your partner needs to hear what's actually on your mind—no cryptic vibes. Single? Someone's been lowkey observing how funny and thoughtful you are. The universe is listening.
daily.career: Ideas are flowing, but don't dump them all at once. Pick your strongest concept and flesh it out. Your communication skills are peak right now—use them strategically. This could shift something.
daily.health: Your nervous system might be a little overstimulated, so ground yourself with something tactile. Touch grass, literally. A walk or some stretching will reset your vibe way better than scrolling.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is asking you to slow down and actually listen to what people are saying instead of already planning your response. Mercury's got your back, but the real magic happens when you practice presence over performance.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, this is a week to be honest about what you actually want versus what sounds good on paper. Someone might surprise you with genuine effort—notice it.
weekly.career: Your ideas are valuable, but timing matters more than you think. Before pitching that thing, vibe-check the room first. Small moves this week set up bigger momentum later.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity right now. Skip the extreme stuff and lean into what actually feels sustainable. Rest isn't lazy, it's strategic.
